title: Support configurable git remote for crosslink hub/knowledge branches

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--config-tracker-remote
comments.content: Plan: Add a tracker_remote config key to hook-config.json (defaults to 'origin'). Add a remote: String field to SyncManager and KnowledgeManager, read from config in their ::new() constructors. Replace all ~35 hardcoded 'origin' literals with &self.remote in sync.rs, knowledge.rs, shared_writer.rs. For command files (trust.rs, migrate.rs, agent.rs), add a helper to read the tracker remote from config. The style.rs 'origin' references are for the separate style cache repo and should NOT be changed. Add 'tracker_remote' to the config registry in config.rs so users can set it via crosslink config set tracker_remote <name>.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--config-tracker-remote
comments.content: Observation: Edits were applied to the main repo (/Users/max/git-forecast/crosslink/crosslink/src/) rather than the worktree. The Read/Edit tools resolved to the main repo path. Need to copy changes to the worktree files.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--config-tracker-remote
comments.content: Work-check hook blocking file comparison commands outside worktree
comments.intervention_context: Trying to compare main repo files with worktree files

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--config-tracker-remote
comments.content: Result: All code changes applied and verified. 7 files modified (sync.rs, knowledge.rs, shared_writer.rs, config.rs, trust.rs, migrate.rs, agent.rs). Added read_tracker_remote() in sync.rs, String config type, tracker_remote config key. All 149 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--config-tracker-remote
comments.content: Self-review: (1) read_tracker_remote defaults to 'origin' - backward compatible ✓ (2) style.rs and agent.rs:165 intentionally not changed - they reference different remotes ✓ (3) All 149 tests pass ✓ (4) clippy clean ✓ (5) fmt clean ✓ (6) Config registered with String type, get/set/show/list/diff all work ✓
